description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named windows that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow has three jobs: test-windows, package-exe, and package-msi, all running on windows-latest. The test-windows job checks out the code, sets up build variables, installs Qt, sets up nmake and several other dependencies, builds the project, and runs tests. The package-exe and package-msi jobs depend on test-windows, set up similar dependencies, build the project, and then package it into exe and msi files respectively, which are then uploaded.
